T-007.title: Add export/sync mode (write memories to markdown files)

T-008.title: v0.2: Update README and SKILL.md to document all commands
T-008.notes:
## Problem

README.md and SKILL.md only document `/remember-doc` and the `docs_memory_search` tool. The v0.1.1 update added three new commands that are not documented anywhere:

- `/search-docs <query> [limit]` - search docs memories by query
- `/list-docs [limit]` - list recent docs memories
- `/forget-doc <id>` - delete a docs memory by ID (requires auth)

The `maxItems` config option is also undocumented.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] README.md Usage section lists all 4 commands with example

T-009.title: v0.2: /list-docs should display item IDs for use with /forget-doc
T-009.notes:
## Problem

The `/list-docs` command truncates output to date and text preview but does not show the item ID. The `/forget-doc` command requires an ID to delete an item. Users currently have no way to discover the ID of a memory item through the CLI.

This makes `/forget-doc` effectively unusable without inspecting the raw JSONL file.

## Current behavior

```
1. [2026-02-27] Dubai: decide A vs B, then collect facts...
```

## Expected behavior

```
1. [abc123] [2026-02-27] Dubai: decide A vs B,

T-010.title: v0.2: Add unit tests for all commands and the search tool
T-010.notes:
## Problem

The plugin has zero test coverage. The CONVENTIONS.md states "All new code must have unit tests" and "Tests must pass before every commit," but no tests exist. This is the most critical gap for v0.2.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Unit tests for `/remember-doc` - stores item, redacts secrets, rejects empty input
- [ ] Unit tests for `/search-docs` - returns ranked results, respects limit, handles empty query
- [ ] Unit tests for `/list-docs` - returns items in reverse chronological o

T-011.title: v0.2: export/sync mode (git-first)
T-011.notes:
Optional export mode that writes docs memory to a directory of markdown files (one per item) for repo/wiki sync.

Acceptance:
- config: exportDir
- deterministic filenames
- no secrets

T-012.title: v0.2: /remember-doc supports tags + project
T-012.notes:
Extend /remember-doc to support optional metadata, e.g.
/remember-doc --tags dubai,tax --project dubai <text>
Store meta fields and expose in search results.
